## Checklist

- [ ] Read [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) / [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) conventions
- [ ] `bash -n` passes on every changed `.sh` script (and `shellcheck` locally, if available)
- [ ] Manifest still parses / no duplicate action ids (if `herdr-plugin.toml` changed)
- [ ] Docs updated to match any behavior/action-id/config-key change (`docs/`, `PLAN.md` if it
      affects verified milestone behavior)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Tested against a real `herdr`+`fresh` install (describe what/how below), or explain why
      that wasn't possible
